docs.title: Welcome to Adhoc
docs.text: This project develops an in-memory transformation engine to enable computations of complex KPIs on top of any aggregation engine.

docs.title: Pivotable
docs.text: Pivotable is a referential implementation of a web application wrapping Adhoc capabilities.

docs.title: Documentation
docs.text:
• Lexicon — key terms and concepts used throughout the project
  • Architecture — class hierarchy diagram generated from source
  • Module Dependencies — inter-module Maven dependency graph

    class CubeWrapper {

    class UnsafeMeasureForest {
    }

    %% ─── Abstract classes ──────────────────────────────────────────
    class AAtotiWrapper {
        ITableAliaser aliaser
    }

    %% ─── Implements / Extends ──────────────────────────────────────
    ITableQueryEngineFactory <|.. TableQueryEngineFactory
    ITableWrapper <|.. CachingTableWrapper
    ITableWrapper <|.. CompositeCubesTableWrapper
    ITableWrapper <|.. EmptyTableWrapper

    ITableWrapper <|.. JooqTableWrapper
    IDSLSupplier <|.. StandardDSLSupplier
    ITableWrapper <|.. AAtotiWrapper
    IMeasureForest <|.. MeasureForest
    IMeasureForest <|.. UnsafeMeasureForest

    %% ─── Composition ───────────────────────────────────────────────
    ColumnsManager *-- IdentityImplicitAliaser : aliaser
    AAtotiWrapper *-- AtotiAliaser : aliaser
    StandardColumnFactory *-- DagBottomUpStrategyNavigableElseHash : bottomUpStrategy
    AdhocFactories *-- StandardColumnFactory : columnFactory
    ColumnsManager *-- EmptyColumnGenerator : columnGenerator

    CompositeCubesTableWrapper *-- ColumnsManager : columnsManager
    StandardMissingColumnManager *-- StandardCoordinateNormalizer : coordinateNormalizer
    ColumnsManager *-- StandardCustomTypeManager : customTypeManager
    CachingTableWrapper *-- ITableWrapper : decorated
    JooqTableWrapperParameters *-- IDSLSupplier : dslSupplier
    CubeWrapper *-- CubeQueryEngine : engine
    CubeQueryEngine *-- UnsafeAdhocEventBusHelpers : eventBus
    TableQueryEngineFactory *-- UnsafeAdhocEventBusHelpers : eventBus
    ColumnsManager *-- UnsafeAdhocEventBusHelpers : eventBus
    CubeQueryEngine *-- AdhocFactories : factories
    TableQueryEngineFactory *-- AdhocFactories : factories
    AdhocFactories *-- IFilterOptimizerFactory : filterOptimizerFactory
    JooqTableWrapperParameters *-- IFilterOptimizerFactory : filterOptimizerFactory
    AdhocFactories *-- AdhocFilterUnsafe : filterStripperFactory
    CubeWrapper *-- IMeasureForest : forest
    StandardQueryPreparator *-- IImplicitFilter : implicitFilter
    StandardQueryPreparator *-- IImplicitOptions : implicitOptions
    TableQueryEngineFactory *-- TableQueryInducerFactory : inducerFactory
    ColumnsManager *-- StandardMissingColumnManager : missingColumnManager
    AdhocFactories *-- IOperatorFactory : operatorFactory
    JooqTableWrapperParameters *-- IOperatorFactory : operatorFactory
    TableQueryEngineFactory *-- TableQueryFactoryFactory : queryFactoryFactory
    CubeWrapper *-- StandardQueryPreparator : queryPreparator
    StandardQueryPreparator *-- IQueryStepCache : queryStepCache
    AdhocFactories *-- ISliceFactoryFactory : sliceFactoryFactory
    AdhocFactories *-- IStopwatchFactory : stopwatchFactory
    CubeWrapper *-- ITableWrapper : table
    JooqTableWrapper *-- JooqTableWrapperParameters : tableParameters
    CubeQueryEngine *-- ITableQueryEngineFactory : tableQueryEngine

docs.title: OLAP
docs.text:
Online Analytical Processing.

It refers to running read-only queries, typically synthesizing a large quantity of data into a smaller set of data (e.g. with GROUP BY).

docs.title: Cube
docs.text:
A cube is a multidimensional structure. A cube can by drilled-down by: - filtering, i.e. selecting a subset of data. - decomposing, i.e. splitting the requested measures ()

In Adhoc, a ICubeWrapper is essentially the pairing of a table with a forest.

docs.title: Table
docs.text:
A table refers to database, where data is going on a per-column basis, with aggregation capabilities.

In Adhoc, a ITableWrapper is the abstraction to external databases.

Example tables are: - InMemoryTable which is essential a List of Maps. - JooqTableWrapper which can wraps many SQL-engine (e.g. DuckDB, PostgreSQL, RedShift, etc) with the help of JooQ. - MongoTableWrapper which demonstrate how to manage NoSQL databases.

A table can run TableQueries.

docs.title: Column
docs.text:
A column generally refers to the column of a table, or a hierarchy of a cube.

In the context of a cube, it may also be called with various names: - dimensions - hierarchies - levels - axes

A column may be scalar/primitive if it is materialized by an actual table column, or calculated (see ICalculatedColumn) when it is derived (e.g. from other columns).

docs.title: Measure
docs.text: A measure is an indicator. One may be confused between: - a transformator archetype (e.g. Combinator, Partitionor), defining the type of formula, which is essentially defined by its ATransformatorQueryStep (e.g. CombinatorQueryStep). - a transformator (e.g. SumCombination implements ICombination), defining the formula but lacking its configuration. - a measure (e.g. Combinator.builder().name("measureName").combinationKey("someKey").build();), defining an instance of a transformator (e.g. with a unique name).
